shared_mechanism: a dually-flat affine connection on the tangent bundle of a smooth manifold that parametrizes a family, where each tangent space is identified with the space of observables/random variables and the connection's zero curvature lets parallel transport determine all of the family's correlators (moments/cumulants)
brief_reason: In information geometry a parametrized family of probability distributions forms a statistical (Frobenius/dually-flat) manifold whose tangent spaces are spaces of random variables (observables) and which carries flat exponential/mixture connections whose flatness fixes all of the family's moments and cumulants, mirroring how the BV moduli space M of QFTs carries a flat quantum connection over a tangent bundle of observables that determines every correlation function of the family.
